S-RANK OMNIFRAME HELENTINE: LACRIMOSA 100% RATE UP


S-Rank Omniframe "Helentine: Lacrimosa" 100% rate up in [Crucible Event Construct Research] and [Fate Themed Construct Research]. Meanwhile, the 6★ exclusive weapon "Hear the Bell" for Lacrimosa will also be available in [Target Weapon Research]!


[OMNIFRAME 100% RATE UP]

Helentine: Lacrimosa

S-Rank Lightning Amplifier, Glaciation Effect

Duration: 2026/7/17 (after maintenance) - 2026/8/18, 23:00 (UTC)


[WEAPON 80% RATE UP]

Hear the Bell

Lacrimosa Exclusive 6★ Folding Buzzsaw

Duration: 2026/7/17 (after maintenance) - Permanent


- During the event, the Construct Helentine: Lacrimosa will be guaranteed when you obtain an S-Rank Omniframe from the [Crucible Event Construct Research] and [Fate Crucible Event Construct Research].
